title: Tesla’s Moving NHTSA Deadline on Accident Data, Iced Superchargers in Sweden, & New Model Y L in Australia
description:
We’ve got a few recent Tesla-focused stories that don’t quite justify a full story on their own, but which seem too notable to skip. Tesla FSD Accident Data Tesla, like other companies, has to report certain data on accidents or incidents that occur during self-driving to the National Highway Traffic ... [continued]
